results.title: ArkFlow
results.description: ArkFlow is a high-performance Rust stream processing engine that seamlessly integrates AI capabilities, providing powerful real-time data processing and intelligent analysis with support for multiple input/output sources, processors, and machine learning model execution.

results.title: ADflow
results.description: ADflow is a massively parallel flow solver developed by the MDO Lab that uses structured multi-block and overset meshes to solve compressible Euler, Navier–Stokes, and Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes equations for aerodynamic, aerostructural, and aeropropulsive design optimization.

results.title: Iconflow
results.description: Iconflow is a Rust library providing a unified API to access and render icon fonts from various packs in UI frameworks like egui and iced.

results.title: Imageflow
results.description: Imageflow is a versatile image processing solution that can be used as a library, command-line tool, or HTTP server, offering both a querystring API and a JSON API for image transformations, filtering, and encoding.

results.title: iFlow CLI
results.description: iFlow CLI is a powerful AI assistant that runs in your terminal, analyzing code, executing tasks, and automating workflows with natural language interaction and free AI models.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring workflows. It orchestrates complex data pipelines with a robust core, CLI, and integrations via provider packages.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is a platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows, allowing users to define workflows as Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) of tasks.

results.title: Coinflow
results.description: Coinflow is a payment stack that helps companies improve conversion and retention rates by accepting fiat payments with instant settlement and enabling instant payouts to user bank accounts.

results.title: graph-flow
results.description: graph-flow is a high-performance, type-safe Rust framework for building complex and interactive multi-agent AI workflows, offering stateful orchestration, flexible execution, and human-in-the-loop capabilities for production environments.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python, providing an extensible framework and a web-based UI for visualization and management.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is a platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows.

results.title: Sflow
results.description: sflow is a powerful and highly-extensible library for processing and manipulating streams of data effortlessly, inspired by functional programming paradigms with features like chunking, transformations, and advanced stream utilities.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python, providing an extensible framework and a web-based UI for visualization and management.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python code, featuring an extensible framework and a web interface for management.

results.title: Goflow API
results.description: The Goflow API allows developers to programmatically manage orders, products, inventory, purchasing, and more. It supports features like authentication, filtering, and bulk actions for efficient e-commerce operations.

results.title: Everflow
results.description: Everflow is a comprehensive platform for managing advertising networks, affiliates, and offers. It provides various APIs and an SDK for tracking, reporting, and integration.

results.title: Akvorado
results.description: Akvorado receives, enriches (with SNMP and GeoIP), and exports network flows like NetFlow/IPFIX and sFlow to ClickHouse via Kafka, offering a web interface for data visualization and exploration.

results.title: Nextflow
results.description: Nextflow is a workflow system for creating scalable, portable, and reproducible workflows, using a dataflow programming model to simplify parallel and distributed pipelines across local, HPC, and cloud environments.

results.title: Nextflow
results.description: Nextflow is a workflow system for creating scalable, portable, and reproducible workflows based on the dataflow programming model, simplifying parallel and distributed pipeline development.

results.title: DFlow
results.description: Dflow is a Python framework for building scientific computing workflows using Argo Workflows, offering user-friendly interfaces for workflow construction and management, with support for distributed and heterogeneous infrastructures.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for developing, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python code with a web-based UI for visualization and management.

results.title: Drawflow
results.description: Drawflow is a simple JavaScript library that allows you to create data flows and node-based diagrams easily with support for multiple inputs/outputs, connections, zoom, and import/export capabilities.

results.title: Numaflow
results.description: Numaflow is a Kubernetes-native, serverless platform for running scalable and reliable event-driven applications, decoupling event sources and sinks for independent auto-scaling and offering language-agnostic processing with built-in observability.

results.title: Mapflow
results.description: Mapflow is an AI-powered Earth observation platform that automates semantic imagery analysis and mapping using deep learning models for buildings, roads, forests, and custom features.

results.title: DeepFlow
results.description: DeepFlow provides zero-code, full-stack, and instant observability for complex cloud-native and AI applications by leveraging eBPF, distributed tracing, profiling, and SmartEncoding.

results.title: Metaflow
results.description: Metaflow is a human-centric framework for building and managing real-life AI and ML systems, streamlining development from prototyping to production.

results.title: Langflow
results.description: Langflow is a visual development platform that empowers developers to rapidly prototype and build AI applications using a user-friendly interface with support for agents and other AI functionalities.

results.title: AdalFlow
results.description: AdalFlow is a PyTorch-like library for building and auto-optimizing language model workflows, including chatbots, RAG, and agents, with features like auto-differentiative prompting and model-agnostic building blocks.

results.title: Gorkflow
results.description: Gorkflow is a powerful, type-safe workflow orchestration engine for Go with built-in state persistence, retries, and DAG-based execution, designed for building complex workflows with minimal boilerplate.

results.title: BKFlow
results.description: 蓝鲸流程引擎服务 BKFlow 是一款基于 Python 实现的面向平台、高效灵活的流程引擎平台，旨在助力接入系统快速获取流程执行能力。
